creator: tcberner@freebsd.org
text:
qupzilla2 will be part of KDE in the future and called falkon -- so maybe it would be better to wait with that port until the newly branded version is properly released and save us the svn mv? :) -- or just call it falkon already.

http://blog.qupzilla.com/2017/08/qupzilla-is-moving-under-kde-and.html
https://github.com/KDE/falkon
